title: Group AI Project Management — Plugin Integration Eval
methodology: Headless claude -p (haiku-4-5) with/without --plugin-dir, graded by eval-grader (sonnet)

key_patterns: CRITICAL NEVER callouts most effective for preventing wrong patterns
Module-to-field-type mappings partially effective (datetime yes, options no)
Theming declaration-usage gap is a Haiku limitation not addressable by skills

conclusion: The Drupal Skills plugin produces measurably better code than baseline across all tested development domains. Aggregate delta of +16.7% (90.0% vs 73.3%) validates the plugin's value for real-world Drupal development. Skills are most impactful for non-obvious patterns (entity annotations, access control, cron/queue architecture) and less impactful where baseline Haiku already knows the patterns.
